title: Create an EoE ending
wikitext:
[]: Create an EoE ending!             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Sun Sep 17, 2006 11:45 am Here's two I made: -Shinji's holding an arm, only to find out it has been not only severed, but is sticking out of GNR's head's mouth. -Shinji is all alone, but Kaworu walks up to him and says, "So it's only us now.". End. YOU [girls] WISH. I'm looking at you, Evangelionfreak.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Sep 17, 2006 12:15 pm Shinji walks straight into a pit of hell and dies.

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Sun Sep 17, 2006 12:26 pm I could see that syncing up with Raining Blood. First step he takes off the edge, then it starts.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Sep 17, 2006 12:41 pm Shinji's holding an arm, only to find out it has been not only severed, but is sticking out of GNR's head's mouth.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Sun Sep 17, 2006 12:41 pm Shinji is on top of Asuka on the beach doing the strangling thing. Anyway Asuka reaches her hand up to carress him. The camera pans out and its dark so we can only really see their shadows, anyway Asuka brings her hand away and a wig appears in her hand. Asuka: YOU! The reply comes quickly "I'm afraid so... but wasn't it nice."

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Sun Sep 17, 2006 1:50 pm Asuka is so overjoyed at seeing Shinji alive that she fires a ginormous missile out of her head and destroys Tokyo 3 (even though it's already been destroyed, like, 3 times over by now).

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Sep 17, 2006 8:08 pm ReDeath anyone? Shinji has just stopped trying to strangle Asuka, but is still laying on top. Asuka (in a strangely masculine voice): Shinji, lets go make out. {Pause} Shinji: Oh...Baby! Screen goes black, cue rock music. :roll: -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Sun Sep 17, 2006 8:46 pm Suddenly Shinji turns into gundam wing and then goes LOLZZZZ SHITTY ENDING

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Sep 17, 2006 9:13 pm Shinji and Asuka walk along a beach and get killed by an LCL shark. Their spirits rise up and they converse among themselves. "I can't believe I left paradise, then got swallowed by a shark five minutes later!" Says Asuka. "After all those angels, we get killed by a statistical oddity..." Remarks Shinji. "What do you mean?" "What are the odds that a shark would survive Third Impact and be able to breath LCL?" "Not very good, I suppose" "When we get to heaven, I'm going to demand a refund." "Should we go now?" "Sure." "Well what are you waiting for?" "Awww...would you look at that!" "What?" "It the end." Screen goes black, and the word fin flashes up on screen.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Mon Sep 18, 2006 11:57 am @CorporalChaos Its awesome... - Shinji (sorrounded by the EVA Series): - ZOMGWTF?! Fuck off, plz! ROUNDHOUSEKIIIIIICK!!!! (Sorry, I just couldn't resist this one :P) - Shinji is the last male on Earth - or at least in Japan -, sorrounded by countless Reis. (I envy him. A LOT ) Then Kaoru comes out of the LCL Sea and says "Hey, Shinji, don't be so selfish! I wasn't with women for ages!". Sorry, I just can't put together a serious one. :P Not that I think you expected any of us to do so.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Sep 18, 2006 2:06 pm I think that Redeath sums it all up for me! "oh baby"

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Sep 18, 2006 2:45 pm Shinji and Asuka are lying on the beach after Third Impact, neither thinking or doing very much. Then Gendo walks out of the LCL and pushes his glasses up his nose. "Rei?" The giant half-a-GNR's-head twitches. "Yes... sir?" "The results are acceptable. We will do it again." A normal-sized Rei steps out of the LCL, followed by the entire main cast. "Yes, sir." Shinji curls into a ball. "I mustn't run away... I mustn't run away... I mustn't run away..." Cue After the End .

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Mon Sep 18, 2006 3:51 pm This is what fanfics are for.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Mon Sep 18, 2006 6:37 pm BobBQ wrote: Shinji and Asuka are lying on the beach after Third Impact, neither thinking or doing very much. Then Gendo walks out of the LCL and pushes his glasses up his nose. "Rei?" The giant half-a-GNR's-head twitches. "Yes... sir?" "The results are acceptable. We will do it again." A normal-sized Rei steps out of the LCL, followed by the entire main cast. "Yes, sir." Shinji curls into a ball. "I mustn't run away... I mustn't run away... I mustn't run away..." Cue After the End .

Asuka (in a strangely masculine voice): Shinji, lets go make out. {Pause} Shinji: Oh...Baby! Screen goes black, cue rock music. :roll: -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[]:             Quote Post by ninetyninenails » Sat Sep 23, 2006 11:58 pm After Shinji chokes Asuka he starts looking at Rei's half face and it winks at him, he then pisses himself.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Sep 24, 2006 12:52 am Shinji gets in one little fight and Asuka gets scared and says "You're moving with your auntie and uncle in Bel Air"

[]:             Quote Post by zeaven » Sun Sep 24, 2006 10:30 am MaggotMaster wrote: Shinji gets in one little fight and Asuka gets scared and says "You're moving with your auntie and uncle in Bel Air"
